title: Fatty Chewy Ethiopian Ricotta Tibs
description: A rich, comforting Ethiopian-inspired dish made with ricotta cheese, featuring a unique texture achieved through careful shaping of nigiri-style rice balls, with a nut-free friendly twist.

ingredients.name: ricotta cheese
ingredients.notes: whole milk ricotta preferred for richness

instructions: Combine ricotta cheese, ground ginger, ground turmeric, paprika, and salt in a mixing bowl, stirring until well combined.
